australian_relation: Australian Screen Online/NFSA public item page for an Australian television ghost-story adaptation with an explicit Victorian setting.
coordinate_evidence_note: ASO page states that the setting of More Winners - His Master's Ghost is Montsalvat; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Montsalvat result.
evidence_summary: Australian Screen Online describes More Winners - His Master's Ghost (1990) as a mystery-comedy about a group of kids on a music camp in a spooky old mansion. The page states that the setting of Montsalvat, a gothic mansion and former artists' colony, is perfect for this ghost-story narrative.
publication_or_organisation: More Winners - His Master's Ghost; Australian Children's Television Foundation / Australian Screen Online
title: ghost in His Master's Ghost at Montsalvat
